# Vendored Libraries

These JavaScript libraries are bundled for offline/LAN support.

## Three.js (r128)

- **License**: MIT
- **Copyright**: Copyright © 2010-2024 three.js authors
- **Files**: `three.min.js`, `OrbitControls.js`

## Socket.IO Client (4.7.5)
- **Source**: https://github.com/socketio/socket.io-client
- **License**: MIT
- **Copyright**: Copyright © 2014-2024 Automattic
- **Files**: `socket.io.min.js`
